# truewatch_notify_object (Data Source)

The `truewatch_notify_object` data source reads an existing TrueWatch alert notification object by `uuid` or exact `name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The exact name of the notify object.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the notify object.

### Read-Only

- `create_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource created at.
- `open_permission_set` (Boolean) Whether custom permission configuration is enabled.
- `opt_set` (String) The option set of notify object in JSON format.
- `permission_set` (List of String) Operation permission configuration.
- `type` (String) The type of notify object.
- `update_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource updated at.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) The UUID of the workspace.
